hypothesis.strategy: Improve 3 lowest-scoring articles (automated-scientific-discovery, ai-safety-in-research, scaling-laws-research) with new 2025-2026 papers and depth expansion
hypothesis.reasoning: automated-scientific-discovery has currency=58 (very low), ai-safety-in-research has depth=52 (very low), scaling-laws-research has depth=58. Adding 2026 papers with new technical sections should move currency and depth substantially. Past sessions show +6-8 points per article when targeting weak dimensions with 5+ papers.

result.lesson: Adding new technical sections with 2025-2026 papers continues to be highly effective. automated-scientific-discovery had the largest gain (+7.4) because currency was extremely low (58) and responded strongly to 8 new papers. ai-safety-in-research depth jumped 52→76 with 3 new substantive sections. Coverage mode triggered because new cross-links created wishlist entries.
